title: Upgrade-like Trims
description: Changes the Armor Trim item texture to look more like the Netherite Upgrade
body: This is a Recourse Pack that changes the Armor Trim item texture to look more like the Netherite Upgrade item texture. My goal was to make it all as "vanilla-like" as possible so that you could use this pack without even realising that these arent the actual vanilla textures.
